mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO order_pay (order_no, pay_no, pay_amount, pay_status, pay_type, pay_time, creator, updater, create_time, update_time, deleted) VALUES
(#{item.orderNo}, #{item.payNo}, #{item.payAmount}, #{item.payStatus}, #{item.payType}, #{item.payTime}, #{item.creator}, #{item.updater}, NOW(), NOW(), 0)

INSERT INTO order_pay (order_no, pay_no, pay_amount, pay_status, pay_type, pay_time, creator, updater, create_time, update_time, deleted) VALUES
(#{item.orderNo}, #{item.payNo}, #{item.payAmount}, #{item.payStatus}, #{item.payType}, #{item.payTime}, #{item.creator}, #{item.updater}, NOW(), NOW(), 0)
ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE pay_amount = VALUES(pay_amount), pay_status = VALUES(pay_status), pay_type = VALUES(pay_type), pay_time = VALUES(pay_time), updater = VALUES(updater), update_time = NOW()
